# viettelidc_vks_nodes (Data Source)

Data source for listing VKS Cluster Nodes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u danh sÃ¡ch Nodes
data "viettelidc_vks_nodes" "cluster_nodes" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `nodes` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
